question: Quand utiliser l'auto-save vs bouton save explicite ?

principles.text: Auto-save on blur pour edition de contenu existant (detail panels). Bouton save explicite pour creation/formulaires de soumission. Indicateur visuel obligatoire.

sources.name: NNg Auto-Saving and Versions
sources.quote: Auto-saving reduces data loss but requires clear status indicators

sources.name: Google Docs/Notion UX patterns
sources.quote: Inline auto-save with visual confirmation is now a standard UX pattern

sources.name: SWEBOK v4 Usability
sources.quote: User feedback must confirm system state changes to prevent confusion

sources.name: W3C ARIA feedback
sources.quote: Live regions and status roles communicate dynamic changes to assistive technology
